behavior_summary: Provides the in-game description for a vase when the player uses the 'U8P_VASE::look' (examine) action.
When invoked, U8P_VASE::look emits a single short bark "vase " to present the object's description and then calls the engine suspend opcode to end/pause the U8P_VASE::look process.
No branching, menus, state changes, or global flag modifications occur; behavior is a simple one-shot description output.
notable_control_flow: Single linear flow: enter U8P_VASE::look process -> output Bark ('vase ') -> call suspend to terminate/pause the process.
No conditional branches, loops, or menu interactions are present.
open_questions: Is there an implicit 'this' parameter passed to U8P_VASE::look representing the vase instance? (inferred but not explicit in the extracted data).
Does the trailing space in the bark string "vase " serve any gameplay formatting purpose or is it an extraction artifact?

main_function.name: U8P_VASE::look
main_function.purpose: Handle player 'U8P_VASE::look' (examine) action for the vase by showing a short description and then suspending the process.
entry_conditions: Invoked when the player examines or 'looks at' the vase (object U8P_VASE::look handler).
Executed as a U8P_VASE::look-type process (processType 0x0208) created by the engine when the object is examined.

function_map.name: U8P_VASE::look
function_map.role: Respond to the player's U8P_VASE::look/examine action by outputting a description and ending the interaction.

function_map.name: suspend
function_map.role: Engine control opcode used to pause or terminate the current process; called by the U8P_VASE::look handler.

external_calls.purpose: Terminate or pause the U8P_VASE::look process after emitting the description; marks the end of the interaction.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides the in-game description for a vase when the player uses the 'U8P_VASE::look' (examine) action.
